title: Bee Removal in West Farms, Bronx | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in West Farms, Bronx. Safe, humane bee extraction from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for fast response!
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in West Farms? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe and effective bee removal services for residential and commercial properties throughout this vibrant Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use humane methods to remove bees while protecting your family and property.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving West Farms and the greater Bronx, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with advanced bee removal techniques. We offer fast response times, transparent pricing between $350-$550, and a satisfaction guarantee that keeps West Farms residents and business owners coming back.
localContext: West Farms' mix of pre-war apartment buildings, residential homes near the Bronx Zoo, and commercial properties along Boston Road creates various environments where bees may nest in eaves, wall voids, or outdoor structures. The area's proximity to green spaces like Bronx Park makes bee activity particularly common during spring and summer months, requiring professional intervention to safely relocate colonies.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in West Farms typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of the colony, location of the hive, and accessibility. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Do you remove bee hives from apartment buildings in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in bee removal from multi-family buildings, which are common in West Farms. We work with property managers and landlords to safely extract hives from building exteriors, balconies, air conditioning units, and other areas while minimizing disruption to residents.

faqs.question: Is bee removal safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use safe, humane bee removal methods that prioritize the health of your family and pets. Our technicians wear protective equipment and establish safety perimeters during removal. Whenever possible, we relocate bees rather than exterminate them, supporting local ecosystems.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in West Farms?
faqs.answer: We understand that bee infestations can be urgent, especially with children or allergic individuals present. We typically offer same-day or next-day service to West Farms residents. Call us immediately if you discover a hive on your property, and we'll dispatch a technician as quickly as possible.
